Headline: #79 79th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 79th/Wallace
ShortDescription: Westbound #79 79th buses are temp. rerouted via 79th, Vincennes, 76th, Halsted, then resume their normal route on 79th due to street blockage near 79th/Wallace.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Westbound #79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, Vincennes, 76th, Halsted, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near 79th/Wallace.

Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Northbound Reroute near 73rd/Exchange
ShortDescription: Northbound  71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Exchange and 71st: due to, street blockage near 73rd/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound  #71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Exchange and 71st: due to, street blockage near 73rd/Exchange.

Southbound  buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
